title: Summary: Turn 21
content: Listed 21 files in `src/agent` directory: agent-instance-repository, agent-instance-service, agent-profile-templates, agent-template-loader, context-resolver, pepe-local-embedding-client (and .py), pepe-memory-mirror, pepe-result-ranking, pepe-result-service, pepe-semantic-client, pepe-supervisor, pepe-types, pepe-worker-process, pepe-worker-protocol, pepe-worker, pueblo-profile, task-context, task-message-builder, task-repository, task-runner.
